originalTitle: The Vanguard ETF Warren Buffett Endorsed in 2014 Would Have Turned $5,000 Into $20,465 Today
summary: The Oracle of Omaha understands that too many investors easily fall into the trap of trying to outperform the market, ultimately undermining their own performance.
content: The Oracle of Omaha understands that too many investors easily fall into the trap of trying to outperform the market, ultimately undermining their own performance.
chineseTitle: 沃伦·巴菲特 2014 年认可的 Vanguard ETF 今天将由 5,000 美元变成 20,465 美元
chineseSummary: 这位奥马哈先知明白，太多的投资者很容易陷入试图超越市场的陷阱，最终损害自己的业绩。
chineseContent: 这位奥马哈先知明白，太多的投资者很容易陷入试图超越市场的陷阱，最终损害自己的业绩。
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于财经市场信号，适合用于观察利率、汇率、股债商品、金融机构和宏观政策变化。
